message:
test(core): property-based tests for ADWIN drift detection (wa-o8bt)

29 proptest properties verifying AdwinWindow, DriftInfo, DriftConfig,
RuleMonitor, and DriftMonitor invariants including window bounds,
mean/variance correctness, delta clamping, direction detection,
serde roundtrips, auto-registration, and summary sorting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
